title: Automatic split for 3 components
excerpt: If project has 3 components (example: email, web, print) is there a way for the 3 components to automatically split into 3 separate groups?

posts.author: jodnt (Joanne Donato)
posts.cookedHtml: If project has 3 components (example: email, web, print) is there a way for the 3 components to automatically split into 3 separate groups?
